message:
fix: resolve Clippy lint errors for CI compliance

Fix all Clippy pedantic/nursery lint violations that caused CI failures:
- Fix significant_drop_tightening by scoping Mutex guards in fastembed_embedder
- Fix format_push_string by using std::fmt::Write in benchmark reporters
- Fix must_use_candidate by adding #[must_use] to benchmark metric functions
- Fix cast_precision_loss/cast_lossless with targeted allows on numeric code
- Fix redundant_closure_for_method_calls (f64::total_cmp, Vec::len)
- Fix map_unwrap_or by using map_or_else
- Fix items_after_statements by moving use before variable declarations
- Fix redundant_clone on cache_dir PathBuf
- Fix struct_excessive_bools with allow on CLI SearchArgs
- Fix too_many_lines with allow on SearchEngine::search
- Fix unnecessary_literal_bound with allow on DummyReranker
- Fix unused_assignments with allows on embedder Option variables
- Add Serialize derives to benchmark structs (SpeedMetrics, QualityMetrics,
  ReliabilityMetrics, BenchmarkMetadata) required by BenchmarkReport
- Fix escaped quotes in model_registry test assertions
- Apply cargo fmt for consistent formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
